name: TweetClaw
description: Post tweets, reply, like, retweet, follow, DM from your chat - full X/Twitter automation powered by Xquik

apiKey.description: Xquik API key (get one at xquik.com/account-manager)

apiKey.label: Xquik API Key
apiKey.help: Generate at xquik.com/account-manager. Required for all API calls.

baseUrl.label: API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Only change if using a self-hosted Xquik instance.

pollingInterval.label: Event Poll Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.help: How often to check for new monitor events. Default: 60 seconds.

pollingEnabled.label: Enable Event Notifications
pollingEnabled.help: Deliver monitor alerts and extraction completions to your chat.
